name: The Goblin Warrens
description: A jagged crack in the hillside opens into a low, twisting passage reeking of smoke and animal musk. Crude torches guttering in wall sconces cast flickering orange light across rough-hewn stone smeared with goblin graffiti. The sound of chattering voices echoes from deeper within.

setting_data.atmosphere: The stench of unwashed bodies and burnt meat hangs heavy in the damp air. Scratching and chittering echoes from unseen tunnels, punctuated by the occasional bark of goblin commands.

npcs.name: Grik the Lookout
npcs.description: A scrawny goblin perched on a rocky ledge near the entrance, clutching a crude shortbow. One ear is notched and scarred.
npcs.backstory: Grik earned his post by being too cowardly to fight on the front lines but sharp-eyed enough to spot intruders.

npcs.name: Snarl
npcs.description: A mangy, oversized rat-like canine with patchy fur and yellowed fangs, chained to a stalagmite near the entrance.
npcs.backstory: The goblins captured this goblin dog as a pup and keep it half-starved to make it aggressive toward intruders.

objects.label: Crude Barricade
objects.description: A haphazard pile of broken furniture, bones, and sharpened sticks forming a low barricade across the passage.

objects.label: Guttering Torch
objects.description: A torch jammed into a crack in the wall, burning with greasy black smoke.

objects.label: Goblin Graffiti
objects.description: Crude pictographs scratched into the rock walls depicting stick-figure goblins defeating much larger foes.

objects.label: Bone Chime Alarm
objects.description: Strings of small bones and shells hung across the passage at ankle height — a primitive alarm system.
